info.description: Celenium API is a powerful tool to access all blockchain data that is processed and indexed by our proprietary indexer. With Celenium API you can retrieve all historical data, off-chain data, blobs and statistics through our REST API. Celenium API indexer are open source, which allows you to not depend on third-party services. You can clone, build and run them independently, giving you full control over all components. If you have any questions or feature requests, please feel free to contact us. We appreciate your feedback!
info.title: Celenium API

get.description: Returns a paginated list of Celestia addresses with their balances. Supports sorting by balance fields, delegation amounts, and block activity.
Returns the total number of unique addresses that have ever appeared on the Celestia network, sourced from the indexer state.
get.summary: Get count of addresses in network

get.description: Returns detailed information about a Celestia address including balances, delegation amounts, and linked Celestial identity. Returns 204 if the address is not found.
Returns a paginated list of blobs submitted via PayForBlobs transactions from the given address. Supports sorting by time or size, and optional join of transaction and namespace entities.

parameters.description: Sort field. If it's empty internal id is used
parameters.name: sort_by

parameters.description: Flag indicating whether entities of transaction and namespace should be attached or not. Default: true
parameters.name: joins

get.description: Returns a paginated list of Celestials NFT identities linked to the given address, including image URLs and associated metadata.
get.summary: Get list of celestial id for address

get.description: Returns a paginated list of active staking delegations from the given address to validators. Use show_zero=true to include delegations with zero amount.
Returns a paginated list of authz grants where the given address is the grantee — i.e., grants that other accounts have authorized to this address.
get.summary: Get grants where address is grantee

get.description: Returns a paginated list of authz grants where the given address is the granter — i.e., grants that this address has authorized to other accounts.
Returns a paginated list of Cosmos SDK messages associated with the given address. Supports filtering by message type.
Returns a paginated list of redelegation records where the given address moved stake from one validator to another.
Returns a time-series histogram of per-address statistics for the selected metric (gas_used, gas_wanted, fee, or tx_count) aggregated by the given timeframe.
Returns a paginated list of transactions sent or signed by the given address. Supports filtering by status, message type, time range, and block height.
Returns a paginated list of pending unbonding (undelegation) records for the given address. Tokens are locked during the unbonding period before they become available.
Returns a paginated list of vesting accounts associated with the given address. Use show_ended=true to also include vestings whose end time has already passed.
Returns a paginated list of governance votes cast by the given address on on-chain proposals.
get.summary: Get list of votes for address

get.description: Returns a paginated list of blob log entries across all namespaces. Supports filtering by commitment, time range, signer addresses, and namespace identifiers. Cursor-based pagination is available via the cursor parameter.

parameters.description: Sort field. If it's empty internal id is used
parameters.name: sort_by

parameters.description: Last entity id which is used for cursor pagination
parameters.name: cursor

post.description:
Returns the raw blob data from the Celestia DA layer for the given block height, namespace hash, and commitment. Requires API key authorization.
To authorize your requests you have to select the required tariff on our site. Then you receive api key to authorize. Api key should be passed via request header `apikey`.
post.summary: Get namespace blob by commitment on height

parameters.description: Request body containing height, commitment and namespace hash
parameters.name: request

post.description:
Returns indexed metadata for a blob (namespace, size, signer, share version, etc.) identified by block height, namespace hash, and commitment. Does not return raw blob data.
To authorize your requests you have to select the required tariff on our site. Then you receive api key to authorize. Api key should be passed via request header `apikey`.
post.summary: Get blob metadata by commitment on height

parameters.description: Request body containing height, commitment and namespace hash
parameters.name: request

post.description: Returns NMT inclusion proofs for a blob identified by block height, namespace hash, and commitment. Proofs can be used to verify that the blob is included in the block's data square.

parameters.description: Request body containing height, commitment and namespace hash
parameters.name: request

get.description: Returns a paginated list of blocks. Supports ascending or descending sort by height. Pass stats=true to include aggregated statistics for each block.
Returns the total number of blocks indexed, including the genesis block.
get.summary: Get count of blocks in network

get.description: Returns detailed information about the block at the given height, including proposer, hash, time, and transaction count. Pass stats=true to also include aggregated block statistics.
Returns a paginated list of blobs submitted via PayForBlobs transactions included in the block at the given height. Supports sorting by time or size.
get.summary: List blobs which was pushed in the block

parameters.description: Sort field. If it's empty internal id is used
parameters.name: sort_by

get.description: Returns the total number of blobs included in the block at the given height
get.summary: Count of blobs which was pushed in the block

get.description: Returns begin-block and end-block ABCI events for the block at the given height. These events are emitted by the Cosmos SDK before and after transaction execution.
get.summary: Get events from begin and end of block

get.description: Returns a paginated list of Cosmos SDK messages included in transactions within the given block. Supports filtering by message type and exclusion list.
get.summary: Get messages contained in the block

parameters.description: Comma-separated message types which should be excluded from list
parameters.name: excluded_msg_type

get.description: Returns the Original Data Square (ODS) structure for the block at the given height, representing the raw data availability square layout used for blob verification.
Returns aggregated statistics for the block at the given height: blob count, total blob size, total fee, gas used/limit, transactions count, and more.
Returns all on-chain governance and module parameters for the Celestia network, including staking, slashing, blob, and other module constants, along with denomination metadata.
Returns all enumeration values used across the API, including rollup tags, categories, stacks, providers, message types, and other typed string constants.

Returns a paginated list of forwarding events. Forwarding events represent cross-domain token transfers
where tokens are forwarded from a Celestia address to a destination address on another domain.
Results can be filtered by transaction hash, address, or block height.

Returns a single forwarding event by its internal ID. The response includes details about
the cross-domain token transfer such as destination domain, destination address,
forwarding address, success/failed counts, and the list of individual transfers.
Returns the estimated gas required to submit a MsgPayForBlobs transaction for the given blob sizes and share versions, using current on-chain gas parameters.
get.summary: Get estimated gas for pay for blob

parameters.description: Comma-separated array of share versions. Default is 0
parameters.name: versions

get.description: Returns estimated gas prices (slow, median, fast) derived from recent transaction history. Useful for setting the gas price when submitting new transactions.
Returns a single estimated gas price string for the selected priority level (slow, median, or fast) based on recent transaction history.
get.summary: Get estimated gas price with priority filter

get.description: Returns the current indexer state: the last indexed block height, total accounts, total blobs size, total voting power, and other network-wide counters.
Returns metadata for all known Hyperlane domains (counterparty chains), keyed by domain ID. Each entry contains the chain name, logo, and domain identifier.
Returns a paginated list of Hyperlane Interchain Gas Paymasters (IGPs) indexed on Celestia. IGPs allow message senders to pay for destination chain gas fees from the origin chain.
Returns a single Hyperlane Interchain Gas Paymaster (IGP) by its hexadecimal identity, including its owner and destination gas configs.
Returns a paginated list of all Hyperlane mailboxes indexed on Celestia, each identified by a hexadecimal identity.
Returns detailed information about a Hyperlane mailbox identified by its hexadecimal identity, including its domain, owner, and linked token/ISM counts.
Returns a paginated list of Hyperlane tokens indexed on Celestia. Supports filtering by owner address, mailbox identity, and token type (synthetic or collateral).
Returns detailed information about a Hyperlane token (synthetic or collateral) identified by its hexadecimal identity, including owner, mailbox, and token type.
Returns a paginated list of Hyperlane cross-chain token transfers. Supports filtering by sender/receiver address, relayer, mailbox, token, transfer type (send/receive), domain, and transaction hash.
Returns a single Hyperlane cross-chain token transfer by its internal id, including source/destination domain, amount, and associated transaction.

Returns a paginated list of ZK Interchain Security Modules (ZK ISMs). ZK ISMs use
Groth16 zero-knowledge proofs to trustlessly verify cross-chain messages from external
chains. Results can be filtered by transaction hash or creator address.

Returns a single ZK Interchain Security Module by its internal id. The response includes
the current trusted state, state root, merkle tree address, and verifier key commitments
used for ZK proof verification.

Returns the list of Hyperlane messages that were authorized via a given ZK ISM through
MsgSubmitMessages transactions. Each entry contains the message id, state root used for
the membership proof, and the signer who submitted the authorization. Results can be
filtered by signer address, transaction hash, or time range.

Returns the history of state updates for a given ZK ISM. Each update corresponds to a
MsgUpdateInterchainSecurityModule transaction that advanced the trusted state of the ISM
via a Groth16 state-transition ZK proof. Results can be filtered by signer address,
transaction hash, or time range.
get.summary: Get ZK ISM state update history

get.description: Returns a paginated list of IBC channels. Supports filtering by client ID, connection ID, and channel status (initialization, opened, closed).
Returns information about an IBC channel by its channel ID, including ordering, state, connection, and counterparty port/channel.
Returns a paginated list of IBC light clients. Supports filtering by chain ID and creator address.
Returns information about an IBC light client identified by its client ID, including the counterparty chain ID, client state type, and trusting period.
Returns a paginated list of IBC connections. Supports filtering by client ID.
Returns information about an IBC connection identified by its connection ID, including linked client ID and counterparty connection details.
Returns the list of known IBC relayers with their Celestia address and associated chain metadata, sourced from the static relayer registry.
Returns a paginated list of IBC token transfers. Supports filtering by channel, chain ID, sender, receiver, either-party address, and transaction hash.
Returns a single IBC token transfer by its internal id, including sender, receiver, amount, denom, and transaction reference.
Returns a paginated list of namespaces. Supports sorting by creation time, PayForBlobs count, or total blob size.

parameters.description: Sort field. If it's empty internal id is used
parameters.name: sort_by

get.description: Returns all versions of the namespace identified by the given 28-byte hex namespace id. Each namespace version is returned as a separate entry.
Returns namespace details for the specific combination of namespace id (28 hex bytes) and version byte. Returns 204 if the namespace is not found.
get.summary: Get namespace info by id and version

get.description: Returns a paginated list of blob log entries for the specified namespace version. Supports filtering by commitment, time range, signer addresses, and cursor-based pagination.

parameters.description: Sort field. If it's empty internal id is used
parameters.name: sort_by

parameters.description: Flag indicating whether entities of rollup, transaction and signer should be attached or not. Default: true
parameters.name: joins

parameters.description: Last entity id which is used for cursor pagination
parameters.name: cursor

get.description: Returns a paginated list of Cosmos SDK messages (e.g. MsgPayForBlobs) that referenced this namespace, identified by version byte and namespace id.
get.summary: Get namespace messages by id and version

get.description: Returns a paginated list of rollups that have submitted blobs to the given namespace (identified by hex id and version).
Returns namespace details for the given base64-encoded namespace identity (version byte + namespace id). Returns 204 if the namespace is not found.
Returns all blobs submitted to the given namespace (identified by base64-encoded hash) at the specified block height, fetched directly from the DA node.
Returns a paginated list of governance proposals. Supports filtering by proposer address, status, and type.
Returns detailed information about a single governance proposal by its internal ID, including proposer, status, votes summary, and deposit information.
Returns a paginated list of governance votes for the given proposal. Can be filtered by vote option (yes/no/no_with_veto/abstain), voter type (address or validator), and specific voter address.
Returns a paginated leaderboard of rollups with their cumulative statistics. Supports filtering by category, tags, stack, and provider. Sorting by blob count, total size, or fee.

parameters.description: If true, shows rollups with activity over the last month
parameters.name: is_active

get.description: Returns the total number of rollups indexed in the Celenium database.
get.summary: Get count of rollups in network

get.description: Returns a paginated leaderboard of rollups with statistics aggregated over the previous 24 hours. Useful for ranking rollups by recent activity such as throughput, blob count, or fee.
get.summary: List rollups info with stats by previous 24 hours

get.description: Returns rollup statistics aggregated by the selected column (stack, type, category, vm, or provider), using the chosen aggregate function (sum or avg).
Returns rollup information by its human-readable slug identifier (e.g. "eclipse"). Returns 204 if no rollup with the given slug is found.
Returns time-series data for all rollups combined, grouped by the selected timeframe. Useful for rendering aggregate charts showing total DA usage across all indexed rollups.
Returns detailed information and cumulative statistics for the rollup identified by its internal id, including name, description, social links, namespaces, and providers.
Returns a paginated list of blobs submitted by the rollup. Supports sorting by time or size and optionally joining transaction and signer entities.

parameters.description: Sort field. If it's empty internal id is used
parameters.name: sort_by

parameters.description: Flag indicating whether entities of transaction and signer should be attached or not. Default: true
parameters.name: joins

get.description: Returns the intra-timeframe distribution (e.g. by hour-of-day) for the selected rollup metric, useful for identifying activity patterns.
Streams a plain-text export of blob metadata submitted by the rollup, optionally filtered by a time range. The response is streamed line by line.
Returns a paginated list of namespaces that the rollup has submitted blobs to.
Returns a list of data availability providers associated with the rollup (e.g. Celestia addresses used for blob submission).
Returns a time-series histogram for the rollup with the selected metric (blobs_count, size, size_per_blob, or fee) aggregated by the given timeframe.

Returns a paginated list of validator upgrade signals (MsgSignalVersion messages) indicating readiness to upgrade to a new software version. Supports filtering by version, validator, transaction hash, and time range.
Returns a paginated list of on-chain network upgrades that were activated. Supports filtering by block height, transaction hash, and signer address.
Returns details of the on-chain network upgrade for the given software version number, including the activation block height and quorum of signals received.
Returns comparative statistics showing how key block metrics (blob size, tx count, fee, block time) changed over the last 24 hours versus the prior 24 hours.
Returns a paginated list of Hyperlane transfer statistics grouped by counterparty domain (chain), including transfer count and total volume.
get.summary: Get stats for hyperlane transfers splitted by domain

get.description: Returns a time-series histogram of aggregated Hyperlane transfer statistics (count or amount) across all domains, filtered by timeframe and optional time range.
get.summary: Get histogram for aggregated hyperlane domains with precomputed stats

get.description: Returns a time-series histogram of Hyperlane transfer statistics (count or amount) for the specified domain, filtered by timeframe and optional time range.
get.summary: Get histogram for hyperlane domains with precomputed stats

get.description: Returns a paginated list of IBC transfer statistics grouped by counterparty chain, including total transfer count, volume, and active channels.
get.summary: Get stats for ibc channels splitted by chains

get.description: Returns a time-series histogram of IBC transfer statistics (count or amount) for the specified channel, filtered by timeframe and optional time range.
get.summary: Get histogram for ibc channels with precomputed stats

get.description: Returns a summary of IBC activity over the last 24 hours: the single largest token transfer and the most active (busiest) IBC channel by transfer count.
get.summary: Get stats for ibc the largest transfer and busiest channel per day

get.description: Returns the count of each Cosmos SDK message type observed in the last 24 hours, useful for understanding network activity composition.
get.summary: Get messages distribution for the last 24 hours

get.description: Returns a time-series histogram of precomputed blob statistics (pfb_count or size) for the specified namespace, filtered by timeframe and optional time range.
get.summary: Get histogram for namespace with precomputed stats

get.description: Returns the top N namespaces sorted by total blob size in descending order. Namespaces outside the top N are aggregated into a single 'others' entry showing the remaining total size.
get.summary: Get namespaces with sorting by size.

get.description: Returns aggregated rollup statistics for the previous 24 hours: total blobs, total size, total fee, and throughput across all indexed rollups.
get.summary: Get rollups stats for last 24 hours

get.description: Returns a time-series histogram of precomputed network statistics for the selected metric and timeframe. Supports filtering by time range.
Returns a running total (cumulative sum) time-series of the selected network metric for the given timeframe. Useful for tracking all-time growth trends.
get.summary: Get cumulative histogram with precomputed stats

get.description: Returns the distribution of blobs across predefined size buckets (e.g. <1KB, 1-16KB, 16-256KB, etc.), showing how many blobs fall into each size group.
get.summary: Get blobs count grouped by size

get.description: Returns the frequency distribution of data availability square sizes (number of rows/columns) used across blocks in the selected time range.
get.summary: Get histogram for square size distribution

get.description: Returns the distribution of delegated stake across validators grouped by delegation size buckets, useful for understanding stake concentration over the selected time range.
Returns a time-series histogram of staking metrics (rewards, commissions, delegation flows, etc.) for the specified validator and timeframe.
get.summary: Get histogram for staking with precomputed stats

get.description:
Returns string value by passed table and function.

### Availiable tables
* `block`
* `block_stats`
* `tx`
* `message`
* `event`


### Availiable functions
* `sum`
* `min`
* `max`
* `avg`
* `count`


`Column` query parameter is required for functions `sum`, `min`, `max` and `avg` and should not pass for `count`.


###  Availiable columns and functions for tables:

#### Block
* `height`         -- min max
* `time`           -- min max

#### Block stats
* `height`         -- min max
* `time`           -- min max
* `tx_count`       -- min max sum avg
* `events_count`   -- min max sum avg
* `blobs_size`     -- min max sum avg
* `block_time`     -- min max sum avg
* `supply_chnge`   -- min max sum avg
* `inflation_rate` -- min max avg
* `fee`            -- min max sum avg
* `gas_used`       -- min max sum avg
* `gas_limit`      -- min max sum avg

#### Tx
* `height`         -- min max
* `time`           -- min max
* `gas_wanted`     -- min max sum avg
* `gas_used`       -- min max sum avg
* `timeout_height` -- min max avg
* `events_count`   -- min max sum avg
* `messages_count` -- min max sum avg
* `fee`            -- min max sum avg

#### Event
* `height`         -- min max
* `time`           -- min max

#### Message
* `height`         -- min max
* `time`           -- min max
get.summary: Get value by table and function

parameters.description: Column name which will be used for computation. Optional for count.
parameters.name: column

get.description: Returns transaction per seconds statistics
Returns a paginated list of transactions. Supports filtering by status, message type, time range, and block height. Pass messages=true to include message details in each result.

parameters.description: Comma-separated message types list which should be excluded
parameters.name: excluded_msg_type

get.description: Returns the total number of transactions indexed, sourced from the current indexer state.
get.summary: Get count of transactions in network

get.description: Returns a paginated list of transactions included in the genesis block (block 0). These are the initial state transactions that bootstrapped the chain.
Returns detailed information about a transaction identified by its hexadecimal hash, including status, gas, fees, and signer. Returns 204 if the transaction is not found.
Returns a paginated list of blobs submitted via the PayForBlobs message in the given transaction. Supports sorting by time or blob size.
get.summary: List blobs which was pushed by transaction

parameters.description: Sort field. If it's empty internal id is used
parameters.name: sort_by

get.description: Returns the total number of blobs submitted via the PayForBlobs message in the given transaction.
get.summary: Count of blobs which was pushed by transaction

get.description: Returns a paginated list of ABCI events emitted during transaction execution for the given transaction hash.
Returns a paginated list of Cosmos SDK messages contained in the transaction identified by the given hash.
Returns a paginated list of validators ordered by voting power. Supports filtering by jailed status and app version.
Returns the total validator count broken down by status: total, active, jailed, and inactive.
Returns aggregated performance metrics for the top N validators by voting power, useful for comparing signing efficiency across the active set.
Returns detailed information about a validator by internal id, including moniker, consensus address, voting power, commission rates, and current status.
Returns a paginated list of blocks proposed by the given validator.
get.summary: Get blocks which was proposed by validator

get.description: Returns a paginated list of delegators staking with this validator, including their delegated amounts. Pass show_zero=true to include delegators with zero balance.
Returns a paginated list of jail events for this validator, including the jail reason and block height at which each jail occurred.
Returns a paginated list of messages submitted by the validator's operator address, filterable by time range.
Returns performance metrics for a single validator including uptime, missed blocks, and block signing efficiency.
Returns the validator's uptime percentage and a history of the last N blocks indicating whether each was signed.
get.summary: Get validator's uptime and history of signed block

get.description: Returns a paginated list of governance votes cast by this validator on on-chain proposals.
get.summary: Get list of votes for validator

get.description: Returns vesting periods by vesting id. Returns a non-empty array only for periodic vestings.

result.description: Search result. Can be one of folowwing types: Block, Address, Namespace, Tx, Validator, Rollup

type.description: Result type which is in the result. Can be 'block', 'address', 'namespace', 'tx', 'validator', 'rollup'

ApiKeyAuth.description: To authorize your requests you have to select the required tariff on our site. Then you receive api key to authorize. Api key should be passed via request header `apikey`.
ApiKeyAuth.name: apikey
